# Single-Scroll Landing Page — Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Build a YAML-driven single-scroll landing page with the TUI as hero, feature cards, install section, and footer — all generated by extending `build.sh`.

**Architecture:** Extends the TUI build pipeline. New files: `template.html`, 6 feature YAMLs. `build.sh` gains a landing page output mode. TUI gets a copy-to-clipboard install badge.

**Tech Stack:** HTML, CSS, vanilla JS, Python (PyYAML), bash

---

### Task 1: Write feature YAML descriptors

**Files:**
- Create: `src/site/features/memory.yaml`
- Create: `src/site/features/briefing.yaml`
- Create: `src/site/features/dispatch.yaml`
- Create: `src/site/features/compression.yaml`
- Create: `src/site/features/methodology.yaml`
- Create: `src/site/features/debugging.yaml`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the features directory and all 6 YAML files**

```yaml
# src/site/features/memory.yaml
name: memory
headline: "Memory that persists"
description: "Your agent remembers decisions, patterns, and context across sessions. No more re-explaining."
icon: "🧠"
order: 1
```

```yaml
# src/site/features/briefing.yaml
name: briefing
headline: "Start every session briefed"
description: "One command pulls Slack, Jira, GitHub, and past sessions into an actionable summary."
icon: "📋"
order: 2
```

```yaml
# src/site/features/dispatch.yaml
name: dispatch
headline: "Dispatch to any agent"
description: "Route tasks to Codex, Gemini, or OpenCode with one slash command. Review comes back inline."
icon: "🚀"
order: 3
```

```yaml
# src/site/features/compression.yaml
name: compression
headline: "60-90% fewer tokens"
description: "RTK transparently compresses CLI output so your context window goes further."
icon: "⚡"
order: 4
```

```yaml
# src/site/features/methodology.yaml
name: methodology
headline: "Built-in dev methodology"
description: "Superpowers skills enforce TDD, plans, reviews, and branch hygiene automatically."
icon: "🏗️"
order: 5
```

```yaml
# src/site/features/debugging.yaml
name: debugging
headline: "Investigate, don't guess"
description: "Systematic debugging from a Slack thread or bug report — evidence first, fix second."
icon: "🔍"
order: 6
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify all 6 files parse correctly**

Run: `python3 -c "import yaml, glob; [print(yaml.safe_load(open(f))['name']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('src/site/features/*.yaml'))]"`
Expected: 6 names printed in order

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/site/features/
git commit -m "feat(site): add 6 feature YAML descriptors"
```

---

### Task 2: Add copy-to-clipboard install badge to TUI engine

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/site/tui/engine.html`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add click handler for cc-path element**

In the `initShell()` function, after the path element setup (around line 440), add:

```javascript
if (pathEl && S.path) {
  pathEl.textContent = S.path.text || '';
  pathEl.href = S.path.url || '#';
  // Copy-to-clipboard on click
  pathEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const installCmd = S.path.text || '';
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(installCmd).then(() => {
      const original = pathEl.textContent;
      pathEl.textContent = 'Copied!';
      pathEl.style.color = 'var(--green)';
      setTimeout(() => {
        pathEl.textContent = original;
        pathEl.style.color = '';
      }, 1500);
    });
  });
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Add cursor pointer style for cc-path**

Add to CSS:

```css
.cc-path { cursor: pointer; }
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Test in browser — click the install text, verify clipboard and flash**

Open `engine.html` directly, click the install command text. Should copy to clipboard and flash "Copied!" in green for 1.5s.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add src/site/tui/engine.html
git commit -m "feat(tui): copy-to-clipboard install badge"
```

### Task 3: Write the landing page template

**Files:**
- Create: `src/site/template.html`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `template.html` with all 4 sections**

The template uses `/* %%CSS_VARS%% */` for CSS (same as engine.html) and HTML comment markers for body content. Full template:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>xgh — Claude on the fastlane</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      /* %%CSS_VARS%% */
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    /* ── Hero ── */
    .hero {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 4rem 2rem 2rem;
      min-height: 100vh;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero-tagline {
      font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-bright);
      margin-bottom: 2rem;
      text-align: center;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }

    .hero-tui {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 900px;
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
    }

    .scroll-hint {
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 12px;
      animation: bob 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes bob { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(6px); } }

    /* ── Features ── */
    .features {
      max-width: 900px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 4rem 2rem;
    }

    .features-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .features-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    }
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }

    .feature-card {
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 1.25rem;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(12px);
      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
    }
    .feature-card.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .feature-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
    .feature-headline {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-bright);
      margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
    }
    .feature-desc {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-dim);
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* ── Install ── */
    .install {
      max-width: 900px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 4rem 2rem;
    }

    .install-title {
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-bright);
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }

    .install-steps {
      list-style: none;
      counter-reset: step;
    }
    .install-step {
      counter-increment: step;
      margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
      font-size: 13px;
    }
    .install-step::before {
      content: counter(step) ".";
      color: var(--accent);
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-right: 0.5rem;
    }
    .install-label { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .install-cmd {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 0.35rem;
      padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      border-radius: 4px;
      color: var(--blue);
      font-size: 13px;
      width: fit-content;
    }

    .install-alt {
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-dim);
    }
    .install-alt code { color: var(--blue); }

    /* ── Footer ── */
    .footer {
      max-width: 900px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 3rem 2rem;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
    }
    .footer a {
      color: var(--text-dim);
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .footer a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
    .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ── Hero ── -->
<section class="hero">
  <h1 class="hero-tagline">Your AI rides faster.</h1>
  <div class="hero-tui">
    <!-- %%TUI_EMBED%% -->
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">↓ scroll</div>
</section>

<!-- ── Features ── -->
<section class="features">
  <div class="features-grid">
    <!-- %%FEATURES%% -->
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── Install ── -->
<section class="install" id="install">
  <h2 class="install-title">Get started</h2>
  <!-- %%INSTALL%% -->
</section>

<!-- ── Footer ── -->
<footer class="footer">
  <span>xgh: Claude on the fastlane.</span>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/extreme-go-horse/xgh" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://www.npmjs.com/package/@extreme-go-horse/xgh" target="_blank">npm</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- ── Scroll animation ── -->
<script>
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });
document.querySelectorAll('.feature-card').forEach(c => observer.observe(c));
</script>

</body>
</html>
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit**

```bash
git add src/site/template.html
git commit -m "feat(site): landing page template with markers"
```

---

### Task 4: Extend build.sh to produce landing page

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/site/tui/build.sh`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add feature YAML parsing after command parsing**

After the existing `cmds_data` loop, add:

```python
# Parse feature YAML files
features_dir = os.path.join(script_dir, '..', 'features')
feature_files = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(features_dir, '*.yaml')))
features_data = []
for ff in feature_files:
    with open(ff) as f:
        features_data.append(yaml.safe_load(f))
features_data.sort(key=lambda x: x.get('order', 99))
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Add HTML rendering functions for features and install**

After the JSON conversion block, add:

```python
# Render feature cards HTML
features_html = ''
for feat in features_data:
    features_html += f'''<div class="feature-card">
  <div class="feature-icon">{feat.get('icon', '')}</div>
  <div class="feature-headline">{feat.get('headline', '')}</div>
  <div class="feature-desc">{feat.get('description', '')}</div>
</div>
'''

# Render install section HTML from commands/install.yaml
install_cmd = next((c for c in cmds_data if c.get('name') == 'install'), None)
install_html = ''
if install_cmd and install_cmd.get('response'):
    install_html += '<ol class="install-steps">\n'
    for line in install_cmd['response']:
        if isinstance(line, dict) and 'dim' in line and line['dim'].startswith(('1.', '2.', '3.')):
            label = line['dim'].split('.', 1)[1].strip().rstrip(':')
            install_html += f'<li class="install-step"><span class="install-label">{label}</span>\n'
        elif isinstance(line, dict) and 'blue' in line and line['blue'].strip():
            cmd_text = line['blue'].strip()
            install_html += f'  <code class="install-cmd">{cmd_text}</code></li>\n'
        elif isinstance(line, dict) and 'dim' in line and 'blue' in line:
            install_html += f'</ol>\n<p class="install-alt">{line["dim"]} <code>{line["blue"].strip()}</code></p>\n'
    if not install_html.endswith('</ol>\n'):
        install_html += '</ol>\n'
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Add landing page generation after TUI output**

After the existing `print(f'Built: {out_file}')`, add:

```python
# Generate landing page
template_file = os.path.join(script_dir, '..', 'template.html')
if os.path.exists(template_file):
    with open(template_file) as f:
        page = f.read()

    # Read generated TUI HTML for inline embedding
    with open(out_file) as f:
        tui_html = f.read()

    # Extract just the <body> content from TUI (skip <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>)
    import re
    body_match = re.search(r'<body>(.*)</body>', tui_html, re.DOTALL)
    tui_body = body_match.group(1).strip() if body_match else tui_html

    # Also extract the TUI <script> content
    scripts = re.findall(r'<script>(.*?)</script>', tui_html, re.DOTALL)
    tui_scripts = '\n'.join(f'<script>{s}</script>' for s in scripts)

    # Inject CSS vars into page template
    page = page.replace('/* %%CSS_VARS%% */', css_vars)

    # Embed TUI: inject body HTML + scripts
    # Extract just the structural HTML (the .window div)
    window_match = re.search(r'(<div class="window">.*?</div>\s*</div>\s*</div>\s*</div>)', tui_body, re.DOTALL)
    if window_match:
        tui_embed = window_match.group(1) + '\n' + tui_scripts
    else:
        tui_embed = tui_body

    page = page.replace('<!-- %%TUI_EMBED%% -->', tui_embed)
    page = page.replace('<!-- %%FEATURES%% -->', features_html)
    page = page.replace('<!-- %%INSTALL%% -->', install_html)

    page_out = os.path.join(script_dir, 'out', 'index.html')
    with open(page_out, 'w') as f:
        f.write(page)
    print(f'Built: {page_out}')
```

Run: `bash src/site/tui/build.sh claude`
Expected:
```
Built: .../out/claude-tui.html
Built: .../out/index.html
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Open index.html in browser, verify all 4 sections render**

Run: `open src/site/tui/out/index.html`

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit**

git commit -m "feat(site): extend build.sh to produce landing page"
